subparts.text: How many matrices would be required for the concatenated transformation of rotating a point about an arbitrary line? Show with an example. Co2
Is rotation a linear transformation, why? Co2
What are the major advantages of using the Breshenham circle drawing algorithm? Co1
Using Bresenham's algorithm, generate the coordinates of the pixels that lie on a line segment having endpoints and Co1,Co3
Derive Bresenham's Circle Drawing Algorithm. Co1,Co3
Explain the steps involved in a typical Product Development Process. Co1

The end points of two lines L1 and L2 are P1 P2 and P3 P4 respectively. Find the parametric equations of the lines. Show the parameterization directions. Are the two lines parallel or perpendicular? Find the coordinates of the intersection point. Co1,Co3,Co2
Find the center of a circle with radius R, that is tangent to two known lines passing through the points P1&P2 and P3&P4 respectively. Co1,Co3,Co2

A triangle is formed by points A, B, and C. Calculate the new coordinates if the triangle is reduced in size using the scale factors Sx= 0.5, Sy= 0.7 and base point is point A._______________ Co1,Co3,Co2
